summary: A local television news segment. It opens with a news anchor in a red dress standing in a studio beside a large screen reading n12 NEW TONIGHT, then cuts to a booking-style portrait of an adult man with dark hair credited to a county sheriff's office. A lower-third chyron names the man and reads a Suffolk DA summary that a 32-year-old man was raped and assaulted outside a restaurant.

script.scene: A news anchor in a red dress stands beside a studio screen reading NEW TONIGHT.
A booking-style portrait of a man appears with a chyron describing the case.

notable_text: n12 NEW TONIGHT; SUFFOLK COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE; SUFFOLK DA: 32-YEAR-OLD MAN RAPED, ASSAULTED STRANGER OUTSIDE AMITYVILLE RESTAURANT
